## Summary

Describe the user-facing reason for this change.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run docs:build`
- [ ] Relevant example script(s), if applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests or examples updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation updated when public APIs or workflows changed
- [ ] Changelog updated for notable user-facing changes
